# patoapis

Paid API products sold through RapidAPI.

## RemoteJobsAPI

Normalized remote job listings from Jobicy and Himalayas with search, filters,
pagination, job details, statistics, freshness metadata, source attribution,
and resilient caching.

Product page: https://patoapis-paid-apis.onrender.com/remote-jobs-api.html
Purchase: https://rapidapi.com/patoalba2019/api/remotejobsapi

## WorldCupTravelDealsAPI

World Cup 2026 travel planning and deal-scoring data for all 16 host cities,
including official FIFA links, provider search routes, heuristic reference
estimates, and transparent scoring for buyer-supplied offers. It does not return
live fare, hotel, or ticket inventory.

Product page: https://patoapis-paid-apis.onrender.com/world-cup-travel-api.html
Purchase: https://rapidapi.com/patoalba2019/api/worldcuptraveldealsapi

## Commercial access

All product endpoints require an authorized paid marketplace gateway. Direct
backend access is blocked. Lightweight health endpoints are public only for
operational monitoring.
